mechanism: As commodity costs push firms from hedge to speculative financing positions, the system becomes increasingly fragile. Once a critical mass of firms crosses into speculative or Ponzi territory, feedback loops activate: credit tightening → further balance sheet deterioration → more firms crossing thresholds → broader credit tightening.
regime_dependence: Depends on initial distribution of firms across Minsky categories; more dangerous when the system is already tilted toward speculative financing
